background: For the illustrative data, we have established \(\bar{x}=603.64, \bar{y}=20.55, s_X=378.451, s_Y=11.725\) and \(r=0.737\).

task.query: Calculate the slope coefficient \(b\) using the correlation \(r\) and standard deviations \(s_Y\) and \(s_X\).
Calculate the intercept coefficient \(a\) using the slope \(b\) and means \(\bar{x}\) and \(\bar{y}\).
